ddls:
CREATE TABLE "demographic_data" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the individual */,
  "workclass" TEXT /* Workclass of the individual (e.g., Private, Self-emp-inc) */,
  "fnlwgt" INTEGER /* Final weight of the individual */,
  "education" TEXT /* Education level of the individual (e.g., 9th, HS-grad) */,
  "education_num" INTEGER /* Number of years of education */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the individual (e.g., Never-married, Separated) */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the individual (e.g., Other-service, Sales) */,
  "relationship" TEXT /* Relationship of the individual (e.g., Not-in-family, Husband) */,
  "race" TEXT /* Race of the individual (e.g., Black, White) */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the individual (e.g., Male, Female) */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the individual */,
  "state" TEXT /* State or region of the individual */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the individual */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the individual */,
  "income" INTEGER /* Actual income of the individual */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., government agency, survey, economic report) */,
  "data_collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_education FOREIGN KEY ("education") REFERENCES education_levels ("education_level"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_occupation FOREIGN KEY ("occupation") REFERENCES occupations ("occupation"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_marital_status FOREIGN KEY ("marital_status") REFERENCES marital_statuses ("marital_status"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_workclass FOREIGN KEY ("workclass") REFERENCES workclasses ("workclass")
)

CREATE TABLE "income_data" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record */,
  "capital_gain" INTEGER /* Capital gain of the individual */,
  "capital_loss" INTEGER /* Capital loss of the individual */,
  "hours_per_week" INTEGER /* Number of hours worked per week */,
  "label" INTEGER /* Income level of the individual (e.g., 0, 1) */,
  "income_source" TEXT /* Source of income (e.g., salary, investment, self-employment) */,
  "income_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of income (e.g., monthly, annually) */,
  "tax_status" TEXT /* Tax status of the individual (e.g., single, married, head of household) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "education_levels" (
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education level */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Name of the education level (e.g., 9th, HS-grad) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the education level */,
  "average_duration" INTEGER /* Average duration of the education level in years */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "workclasses" (
  "workclass_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each workclass */,
  "workclass" TEXT /* Name of the workclass (e.g., Private, Self-emp-inc) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the workclass */,
  "average_hourly_wage" INTEGER /* Average hourly wage for the workclass */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("workclass_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marital_statuses" (
  "marital_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marital status */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Name of the marital status (e.g., Never-married, Separated) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the marital status */,
  "average_age" INTEGER /* Average age of individuals with the marital status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("marital_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "occupations" (
  "occupation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each occupation */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Name of the occupation (e.g., Other-service, Sales) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the occupation */,
  "average_income" INTEGER /* Average income for the occupation */,
  "median_income" INTEGER /* Median income for the occupation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("occupation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
